summary: Frontend testing completed for damage assessment calculation and estimate system. All core features working correctly including login, calculations list, detailed estimates with VIN display, parts/works tables, totals, and navigation.

integration_issues.issue: Sessions expire quickly during extended testing requiring frequent re-login

passed_tests: SMS authentication login flow with phone +79991234567 and code 1234
Calculations list displays 3 applications with VIN, status (Ожидает/Готово), and amounts (33570₽, 130300₽)
Click navigation from application cards to detailed estimate pages
VIN number display in red header (e.g. XTA21703090012345)
Parts table with complete data: names, articles, prices (Дверь задняя левая, LADA-21700620001, 18500₽)
Works table with hours, rates, amounts (Замена двери, 2.50ч, 1400₽/ч, 3500₽)
Correct total calculations: parts sum (22450₽), works sum (11120₽), grand total (33570₽)
Back button 'Все расчёты' returns to calculations list
Pending applications display 'Ожидает' status and 'Расчёт в обработке' message
success_percentage: frontend: 95% - All required features working correctly
